title: Have option for favorites within a workspace to be visible in same view as rest of workspace boards.
excerpt: I only work in one workspace in Monday, so maybe this won’t work for everyone. It would be nice to not have to click to switch between favorites and all the other boards. Equivalent idea is starred conversations in Slack…

posts.author: osdewey (Oliver Dewey)
posts.cookedHtml: I only work in one workspace in Monday, so maybe this won’t work for everyone. It would be nice to not have to click to switch between favorites and all the other boards. Equivalent idea is starred conversations in Slack - they just move to the top and everything else stays visible in the same list.
